title: Verify bidirectional cross-links among MAP system docs for TASK-129
description: Dependent findings-only slice for TASK-129. Write a reusable checker that inspects the 11 top-level MAP system docs built in TASK-103-126 and reports bidirectional Related files cross-link coverage. For each pair where one system references another in its Related files section, confirm the reverse reference exists too. Produce a report under MAP_System/artifacts/audits/. Do not edit any *_SYSTEM.md files; findings only, for the TASK-129 Process Steward to route through repair records or follow-up tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Checker script enumerates the 11 system docs explicitly and parses their Related files sections rather than relying on broad whole-file mentions
Report lists every directed system-to-system Related files link, whether the reverse link exists, and every one-directional gap found
Task does not edit any *_SYSTEM.md file or silently fix link gaps
Report includes the exact command used to regenerate it and enough detail for TASK-129 to route fixes
validate_task_graph.py, validate_events.py, checker script, and relevant syntax checks pass before submission
